name: Videoconferencia
northStar: Collaborative daylight workspace — every surface a white panel under fluorescent clarity, single violet pulse marking where to act.

dos: Use #5d5bd4 exclusively for primary CTA buttons and active navigation indicators — never for decorative color fills or backgrounds.
Apply 24px border-radius to all card containers; apply 8px border-radius to all buttons, badges, and inputs. Never mix these two radii between container and control.
Use Segoe UI Variable Display at weight 600 for headings above 32px; always pair with negative letter-spacing: −0.025em at 20-24px, −0.015em at 32px, −0.01em at 48px+.

Set all section category labels (e.g. NOTICIAS DESTACADAS) in Segoe UI Variable Text 600 12px with letterSpacing=+0.08em and color=#17253d — uppercase tracking only at caption scale, never on headings.
Elevate white cards off the white page using the two-layer shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 0px 0px 2px 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0.14) 0px 2px 4px 0px — no other shadow values.
Reserve Microsoft Blue (#0067b8) for hyperlinks and informational icon fills only — it must never appear on CTA buttons, which belong exclusively to Teams Violet (#5d5bd4).
Maintain the near-white card surface (#fefefe) distinct from the pure white page (#ffffff) to ensure shadow-based elevation reads correctly.
donts: Do not use border-radius values between 8px and 24px on any element — the design system jumps directly from control-scale (8px) to container-scale (24px) with nothing in between except the 200px pill.
Do not apply the Teams Violet (#5d5bd4) to text, borders, or decorative elements — it appears only as button backgroundColor and active state indicator.
Do not use pure black (#000000) for body or heading text — all text uses #17253d (Ink Navy) or #0e1726 (Abyss Navy), preserving the blue-cast warmth of the palette.
Do not stack more than two colors from the violet family (e.g. #5d5bd4 + #333275 + #424197) in a single component — only the primary fill and one hover/focus state.
Do not use shadows with vertical offset above 4px or opacity above 0.15 — the elevation system is intentionally near-invisible.
Do not set headline letterSpacing to 0 or positive values at any display size — negative tracking is mandatory at all sizes above 14px.
Do not use Segoe UI (system fallback) for any designed UI element — it is reserved for browser-native and OS-rendered contexts only; all explicit text must use Segoe UI Variable Text or Display.

colors.name: Teams Violet
colors.role: Primary CTA buttons, active nav underlines, badge backgrounds — the single saturated signal on an otherwise achromatic page. Vivid violet-purple stands apart from Microsoft blue (#0067b8) to brand Teams distinctly within the Microsoft ecosystem.

colors.name: Teams Midnight
colors.role: Hover and pressed states for Teams Violet buttons, nav link active text — darker violet that deepens without shifting hue.

colors.name: Teams Deep
colors.role: Button pressed/focus states — intermediate violet between Teams Violet and Teams Midnight.

colors.name: Microsoft Blue
colors.role: Link text, icon fills, navigation affordances — the legacy Microsoft hyperlink blue used on informational elements, never on CTA buttons.

colors.name: Ink Navy
colors.role: Primary text, headings, body copy, icons — near-black with a distinct blue cast that avoids pure black harshness.

colors.name: Abyss Navy
colors.role: Darkest heading weight, button text on transparent dark-background variants.

colors.name: Steel
colors.role: Secondary body text, captions, placeholder text, icon color for inactive states.

colors.name: Graphite
colors.role: Nav link text, body text at medium emphasis.

colors.name: Cloud
colors.role: Page backgrounds, card surfaces, button text on dark.

colors.name: Lace
colors.role: Subtle lilac-tinted surface for decorative hero background areas.

colors.name: Ice Border
colors.role: Badge borders, light blue-tinted separator lines.

colors.name: Mist
colors.role: Subtle borders, dividers, input outlines in resting state.

colors.name: Near White
colors.role: Card surface background — one step off pure white to reduce glare on elevated surfaces.

designSystem.layout: Max-width content is approximately 1600px centered, but hero and nav bands run visually full-bleed. The hero is a 2-column split: left third for headline + CTA text, right two-thirds for the floating product visual — asymmetric, image-heavy. Below the hero a sticky horizontal tab navigation bar with CTA button spans full width. Section rhythm alternates #ffffff bands: featured news in 2-column card grid, then a full-width text section for solutions, continuing downward. Cards in the news grid are equal-height 2-up at the viewport shown. Navigation is a fixed top bar (54px) with logo left, nav center, actions right — mega-menu dropdowns on hover. A fixed right-edge floating icon bar for contact actions provides persistent access without breaking the main layout. Vertical section gaps are 64-96px, giving the page a spacious corporate breathing room between each content band.
designSystem.imagery: The hero features a 3D-rendered product screenshot composite — the Teams app UI rendered as a floating tablet/screen with illustrated lavender and teal decorative elements beneath it, plus emoji reaction graphics floating around it. The treatment is product-showcase-first: the interface itself is the hero visual, not people or lifestyle. Below the fold, editorial photography takes over: tightly cropped portraits and workspace candids at 16:9 ratio filling the top half of article cards — warm ambient light, realistic color grading, no duotone or filters. Photography is lifestyle-adjacent but workspace-focused (people at desks, on video calls) rather than abstract or staged against solid colors. Icon style throughout is Microsoft Fluent: filled with rounded corners, monochromatic #17253d at nav size, multicolor Microsoft flag logo as the single exception. Image density is moderate — alternating text-dominant and image-plus-text sections, cards always lead with the image.

similar.why: Horizontal tab navigation bar with active-underline indicator, card-grid news section, and a single brand-accent color on all primary CTAs with white/light page.
Product-screenshot-as-hero-visual on white background, editorial photography in 2-column card grid, corporate-light palette with single vivid accent.
Light enterprise SaaS page with sticky secondary nav, floating 3D product visual in hero, and photography cards below fold.
Deep navy text on white with a vivid single-hue accent, 24px rounded cards, and mixed photography/illustration visual language.
Enterprise collaboration product with near-identical hero pattern: product UI screenshot composite right-aligned against white left-side headline.

surfaces.name: Card Surface
surfaces.purpose: Elevated content cards floating above page background

surfaces.name: Lilac Tint
surfaces.purpose: Hero decorative background wash behind product imagery

designSystem.northStar: Collaborative daylight workspace — every surface a white panel under fluorescent clarity, single violet pulse marking where to act.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: backgroundColor=#5d5bd4, color=#ffffff, borderRadius=8px, padding=8px 16px, font: Segoe UI Variable Text 500 15px. Hover darkens to #424197. The 8px radius is a hard corner relative to the 24px card radius — buttons feel precise, not soft.

components.name: Ghost Navigation Button
components.role: Outline-style secondary actions in the top nav (Descargar Teams, Iniciar sesión)
components.description: backgroundColor=transparent, color=#262626, border=1px solid transparent (visual separation via spacing only), borderRadius=0px, padding=16px 30px 16px 12px. Zero border radius — purely typographic with no frame.

components.name: Underline Navigation Button
components.role: Active tab/section indicator in horizontal content nav
components.description: backgroundColor=transparent, color=#0e1726, borderBottom=2px solid #0e1726, borderRadius=0px, padding=0 0 32px 0. Bottom border only — tab indicator with generous 32px bottom padding to position the underline at baseline distance.

components.name: Pill Secondary Button
components.role: Decorative or secondary CTA overlaid on hero visual areas
components.description: backgroundColor=transparent, color=#ffffff, borderRadius=200px, padding=16px. Full pill shape reserved for white-text variants appearing over imagery — the only element with >24px radius, creating maximum contrast with sharp-cornered primary buttons.

components.name: Transparent Content Card
components.description: backgroundColor=transparent, borderRadius=0px, boxShadow=none, padding=0. Used for grid cells that rely on surrounding whitespace rather than a surface for grouping.

components.name: Labeled Badge
components.description: backgroundColor=transparent, color=#17253d, borderRadius=0px, padding=0. Uppercase tracking at +0.08em (letterSpacing=0.08em via Segoe UI Variable Text), weight 600, 12px. Zero-padding text label — no visual container, relying on tracking and weight for distinction.

components.name: Surface Badge
components.role: Tag chips on cards and content metadata
components.description: backgroundColor=#fefefe, color=#17253d, borderRadius=8px, padding=4px 8px. White card-colored surface with same 8px radius as buttons — system-consistent without hierarchical confusion.

components.name: Top Navigation Bar
components.role: Global site header with Microsoft logo, product name, and nav links
components.description: backgroundColor=#ffffff, height=54px, borderBottom=1px solid #bdc5d2. Product name 'Teams' in Segoe UI Variable Text 600 at 15px. Nav items at 14px weight 400 #262626 with dropdown chevrons. Right-side CTAs use Ghost and Primary Button styles.

components.name: Horizontal Section Tab Nav
components.role: In-page content navigation (Noticias destacadas, Soluciones, Productos y servicios)
components.description: backgroundColor=#ffffff, borderBottom=1px solid #bdc5d2, height=56px. Active item uses Underline Navigation Button style. Right-aligned CTA button uses Primary CTA Button style at #5d5bd4.

components.name: Hero Section
components.role: Full-width page opener with headline, body, CTA, and product visual
components.description: backgroundColor=#ffffff (with #fbf5fb lilac tint at far right). Headline: Segoe UI Variable Display 600 48px tracking −0.01em, color=#0e1726. Body: 16px 400 #616161. CTA: Primary CTA Button. Right half: 3D product screenshot floating on illustrated background — image is contained, not full-bleed.

components.name: Article Preview Card
components.role: News and blog post previews in card grid
components.description: Uses Elevated Content Card as container. Image fills top of card with no padding, borderRadius=24px 24px 0 0 clipping. Title: Segoe UI Variable Text 600 20px #17253d. Body: 14px 400 #616161. Footer: 'Más información' link in Microsoft Blue (#0067b8) with right-arrow icon, 16px padding all sides.

components.name: Floating Icon Bar
components.role: Fixed right-side quick-action icons (contact, mail, phone)
components.description: backgroundColor=#ffffff, borderRadius=24px 0 0 24px (left-side pill), boxShadow=rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 0px 0px 2px 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0.14) 0px 2px 4px 0px. Icon color #17253d. Positioned fixed right:0, vertically centered.

typography.role: The primary workhorse: all headings, body text, nav labels, buttons, badges. Microsoft's own variable font whose optical sizing axis auto-adjusts letterform construction at different sizes — tighter tracking at display scale (48px at −0.01em to −0.025em) is baked into the font's design intent, not added post hoc.
typography.lineHeight: 1.00–1.50 (1.43 at body sizes, 1.20–1.25 at subheading, 1.06–1.17 at large display)
typography.letterSpacing: -0.03em at 12-14px, -0.025em at 16-20px, -0.02em at 24px, -0.015em at 32px, -0.01em at 48px; +0.08em for all-caps labels

typography.role: Hero and section headings at large scale — the Display optical axis activates wider, more open letterforms than the Text axis at the same point size, making headlines feel more authoritative at 48px and above.
Tight-tracked small labels and fine-print contexts.
System fallback used in footer, some nav utility links, and browser-rendered UI chrome. No tracking adjustments — falls back to OS default rendering.

designSystem.description: Microsoft Teams' page feels like a sunlit open-plan office — bright white expanses punctuated by the distinctive Teams violet-purple (#5d5bd4) and dense navy text (#17253d). The light is almost clinical, with near-zero ambient color tinting, pulling all chromatic attention to the vivid Teams purple accent and photography. Segoe UI Variable's tight negative tracking at display sizes (−0.025em at 48px) is the typographic signature — Microsoft's own variable font doing what no system font substitute can replicate, with headlines that compress horizontally as they scale up. Cards sit as floating white rectangles with a 24px corner radius and a paired micro-shadow system, never harsh — rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 0px 0px 2px plus rgba(0,0,0,0.14) 0px 2px 4px creates a faint lift without drama. The only pill-shaped element (200px radius) reserved for one secondary UI button variant signals interactivity hierarchy without color alone.
designSystem.elevationPhilosophy: Shadow is used exclusively to lift white surfaces off the white page — not for drama or depth hierarchy. Both shadow layers operate below 15% opacity, making the elevation invisible on colored backgrounds and only readable white-on-white. The 0px 0px 2px ambient layer defines the card edge; the 0px 2px 4px directional layer suggests physical thickness. No element uses shadows above 4px vertical offset — depth is minimal by design.
